name: Database Development
description: Stable and secure databases for quick search, accurate accounting, and automation. Your system runs smoothly, your data stays under control.

name: Server Configuration
description: Turnkey servers on Linux and Windows, including virtualization via Proxmox or VMWare. Everything works stably, securely, and ready for heavy loads.

name: API Development
description: Flexible and powerful REST APIs — microservices or monolithic. Your services are easy to integrate, scale, and work reliably.

name: Web Development
description: Full-stack web applications that promote your product, attract customers, and work without glitches. From idea to full launch.
